issues: Exemplar content is sophisticated for grade 6 - uses advanced vocabulary and complex sentence structures that may challenge some students
Social media topic in exemplar may not resonate with all 6th graders who have limited social media experience
Could benefit from more explicit scaffolding or sentence starters for struggling writers
strengths: Strong alignment with RI.6.1 standard requiring textual evidence and inference skills
Well-structured prompts with clear expectations and specific requirements
Exemplar demonstrates excellent use of varied evidence types (statistics, expert testimony, case studies)
Prompts progress logically from basic evidence identification to more complex evaluation
Maintains neutral worldview throughout all content
Includes direct quote requirements which reinforces citation skills
Addresses both explicit and implicit textual analysis as required by standard

detailed_feedback.structure: Template follows proper format with all required components present and well-organized
detailed_feedback.alignment: Excellent alignment with RI.6.1 - all prompts require citing textual evidence and making inferences
detailed_feedback.clarity: Instructions are clear and specific, though exemplar vocabulary may be challenging for some 6th graders
detailed_feedback.difficulty: Appropriate challenge level with good progression from basic to advanced analysis skills
detailed_feedback.inclusivity: Content is accessible and culturally neutral, though exemplar topic assumes social media familiarity
detailed_feedback.accuracy: Content is pedagogically sound and factually accurate throughout
